description: Create a new custom vessel model named 'SectorLight' in Bridge Command to mark a navigational hazard. The model must be located in the 'Models/Othership/SectorLight' directory and include a 'boat.ini' file defining specific light sectors: a Red Danger Sector visible from 260° to 280°, and a White Safe Water sector for the remainder of the circle (280° through 360°/0° to 260°), both with a minimum range of 2.0 nm. Additionally, create a verification scenario at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/Sector_Light_Test/' containing 'environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini'. In this scenario, place the 'SectorLight' at a fixed position and position the Own Ship within the Red sector (e.g., at a bearing of 270° from the light) to confirm correct visibility.
